## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Advocate, exploring potential collaboration for SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers expert-led, AI-powered content creation with editorial ($9k/mo) and programmatic SEO ($12k/mo) services](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Advocate seeks to improve organic search visibility and brand credibility in the competitive social security disability space](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term organic traffic growth, expert-led strategy, and becoming an authoritative source](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Advocate will internally discuss potential engagement options and review additional case studies/pricing](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Background and Approach

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging experience from IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and other tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Rapid growth from workshops to full-service content creation (10 to 62 employees since January)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Expert-led team with diverse backgrounds (TechCrunch, ClickUp, SEMrush, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Focus on outcome-driven content strategy, not just content production](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Emphasis on becoming an authoritative source for long-term SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI-powered workflows for deep research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Human experts (content managers, managing editors) refine and optimize content](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Calibration period (2-4 weeks) to align strategy with client goals](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Flexible authorship options (client or GrowthX team members)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Ongoing strategy refinement and performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### Advocate's Current Situation and Goals

  - [New company in competitive social security disability space](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Limited success with existing content (few dozen blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Aims to improve organic search visibility and brand credibility](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Considering both in-house content creation and potential external support](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)

### Potential Strategies for Advocate

  - [Editorial content to build authority and cover key topics](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO for state-specific content (e.g., filing in different states)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [Interactive tools/calculators to attract and engage users](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)
  - [Focus on conditions with higher denial rates to showcase value of advocacy](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)

### Pricing and Next Steps

  - [Editorial: $9,000/month for 50,000 words (5-8 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: $12,000/month for 1,200 templatized pages](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Link building: $6,000/month (optional add-on)](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2486.0)
  - [Advocate to review internally and consider engagement options](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide additional case studies and pricing details](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Advocate team to discuss internally and evaluate potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [GrowthX to send pricing details for different engagement types](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide additional case studies, particularly Ramp collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Advocate to consider GrowthX services vs. scaling in-house content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled if Advocate decides to pursue collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yFT862DTPzu2uFYsy5APzfaywzdCKcoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2519.0)
